'''Kezz'Sreik'Kuras''' ("Predator Beast of the Dusk" in the [[Coynite language]]) was a [[Constellation/Legends|constellation]] of the [[Coynite/Legends|Coynite]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It included the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Kuras]].

*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
